description_long: This object is a compact, double-barreled shotgun with a robust, industrial design. The barrels are arranged side-by-side, both featuring a matte black metallic finish with subtle wear and texturing. The receiver and action area are constructed from dark metal, with visible mechanical details and a prominent hinge mechanism. The grip and stock are made of dark, polished wood, ergonomically shaped for a secure hold, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial. The overall build is short and sturdy, suggesting a weapon designed for close-quarters use. The object exhibits a combination of wood and metal materials, giving it a classic yet utilitarian appearance.
description: A compact, side-by-side double-barreled shotgun with a dark metal body and polished wooden grip, featuring a robust, industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels side-by-side, with the muzzle openings and a hint of the front sight visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the barrels, the wooden grip, and the mechanical hinge near the action.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the alignment of the barrels, the curvature of the grip, and the trigger guard.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the wooden grip and metallic receiver.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, both barrels of equal length with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
